description:
3-in-1 Dressing Table Set 】: A compact dressing table with a flip mirror and stool. When the flip tabletop is a stylish dressing table, it is a bedside table with additional storage space and can also be used as a writer's workbench. This is a simple, convenient, and practical home appliance.

【 3-color LED Flip Makeup Mirror 】: Our flip makeup mirror is equipped with LED lights, providing three lighting effects: white light, natural light, and warm light. Click to adjust color, long press to adjust brightness, easily meet your various makeup needs during the day or night.

[Sufficient storage space]: This dresser is equipped with a 7-inch (about 17.2cm) deep hidden storage space and a visible drawer, which can easily organize various cosmetics, perfume, makeup brushes and jewelry. Three hidden storage drawers and removable cushioned stools provide more storage space. The curved corners are designed to avoid collisions and injuries when family members use it

【 High quality materials and easy installation 】: Our white compact dressing table is made of thick high-density fiberboard, which is scratch resistant, wear-resistant, sturdy and durable, and can be used for a long time. Comes with detailed installation instructions and hardware tools. The installation instructions are clear and easy to understand, and all components are labeled. Simply follow the steps to easily complete the assembly

Width 60, height 80, mirror height 40, depth 40

Board, mirror, screw, guide rail, hinge, screwdriver, seat cushion
